description: Version history of agent prompts for tracking evolution

entries.changes: Added explicit feedback loop commands (ruff check, mypy, pytest). Added container health check step. Added debugging guidance and .pth fix documentation.
Initial version. Operating loop, golden rules, delegation pattern.
Fixed ruff command (removed --fix), added pytest to feedback loop, fixed mypy flag.
Replaced :feedback <path> with explicit docker exec commands.
Initial subagent prompt creation with USE THE `write` TOOL pattern.
